meta.description: Offline CVE advisory seed for DistroForge package scanning. Match is by package name at planning time (no .deb is fetched or built). Replace or extend this file with a maintained export from the Ubuntu Security Notices / OSV feed and point --vuln-db / trust.vuln_scan.db_path at it for production gating.

advisories.summary: SOCKS5 heap buffer overflow in curl/libcurl.
Heap buffer overflow in libwebp WebP image decoding.
Heap-based buffer overflow in sudo (Baron Samedit) allows local root.
Malicious backdoor in upstream xz/liblzma build tooling.
X.400 address type confusion in X.509 GeneralName handling.
Dirty Pipe: improper Unix pipe handling allows local privilege escalation.
